name: Sort the Court!
author: Poki
description: Sort the Court! is a classic game where you rule as the king or queen of a growing kingdom! Each day, quirky characters and strange creatures come to you with questions, and your simple yes or no answers will shape the future of your land. Will your choices lead to prosperity or chaos? Make wise or wild decisions, grow your kingdom, and see how your rule unfolds! Are you ready to take the throne? Sort the Court! Latest game Update Now on Mobile: you can finally play sort the Court! on your mobile Side quests: take on side quests and new challenges with a fresh quest system and an improved UI Save progress: save your progress to your Poki account and pick up right where you left off, on any device How to play Sort the Court!? Click to make the choice. You can also press Y or N to make the choice. Who created Sort the Court!? Sort the Court! is created by graebor. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Sort the Court! for free? You can play Sort the Court! for free on Poki. Can I play Sort the Court! on mobile devices and desktop? Sort the Court! can be played on your computer.
